title: Bindiya Sarkar
desc: Abhay questions Bindiya's request to halt the investigation. Subsequently, he becomes furious when Bindiya asks him to complete her Karwa Chauth fast.

title: Bindiya Sarkar
desc: Barfi Devi plots to orchestrate a bond between Abhay and Bindiya. Later, when Bindiya's dress catches fire, Abhay swiftly intervenes to extinguish the flames.

title: Bindiya Sarkar
desc: Barfi Devi's hired assassin inadvertently exposes her plans when Abhay apprehends him. Thereafter, Barfi Devi feigns distress by burning her hand, but Bindiya stops her act.

title: Bindiya Sarkar
desc: Barfi Devi's machinations turn Abhay against Bindiya, ensnaring her in a sinister plot. However, Bindiya challenges Barfi Devi and vows to prove her innocence to Abhay.

title: Deewani
desc: Meera accidentally discovers Garv's scheme against Parth and resolves to protect him. Subsequently, she attempts to reason with Parth about Payal, but he dismisses her concerns.

title: Deewani
desc: Shakuntala organises a puja for the newlyweds, but Parth fails to attend. Subsequently, when Sheela mocks Meera's marriage, Shakuntala promptly silences her.

title: Main Bhi Ardhangini
desc: Chitra, the spirit of Madhav's dead wife, comes back into his life in order to bring Vaidehi and him together. Meanwhile, she also plots to ruin the life of Neela, his stepmother, for murdering her.

title: Naaginn - Waadon Ki Agnipariksha
desc: Amrita realises that she will only have one hour to take off Arjun's locket. Soon, things worsen when an unexpected obstacle interrupts her plan.

title: Naaginn - Waadon Ki Agnipariksha
desc: Amrita discovers the truth about the locket when she fails to find Naagrani. Soon, she decides to confront Bhairav Baba.

title: Crime Files
desc: A man spirals out of control when he catches his wife having an affair with his younger brother. Soon, the situation worsens as more innocents get involved.

title: Crime Files

title: Crime Files
desc: A woman seeks revenge against a doctor after he lies to her and tries to manipulate her. However, the doctor's actions cause a rift between the woman and her husband.

title: Crime Files
desc: A girl ends up in trouble when she has an affair with her sister's husband and gets pregnant from the encounter.
